scripts.lint: npm --prefix shoes-frontend run lint && npm --prefix shoes-admin run lint && npm --prefix shoes-backend run lint
scripts.build: npm --prefix shoes-frontend run build && npm --prefix shoes-admin run build && npm --prefix shoes-backend run build
scripts.test: cd shoes-frontend && npx tsx src/utils/productDisplay.test.ts && cd ../shoes-backend && npx tsx src/translation.test.ts
scripts.verify: npm run test && npm run lint && npm run build
